# remnawave_system_bandwidth_stats (Data Source)

Returns system bandwidth statistics from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_system_bandwidth_stats" "current" {}

output "system_bandwidth" {
  value = data.remnawave_system_bandwidth_stats.current
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `response` (String) Raw JSON response from the API.
